# Unmute AI - Detailed Product Information

> AI-powered academic translation SaaS for researchers worldwide.
> Write papers in your native language, publish in any language.

## Product Overview

Unmute AI addresses a critical problem in academic publishing: non-native English speaking researchers spend up to 40% of their research time struggling with language rather than advancing science. Unmute AI eliminates this barrier by providing AI-powered translation that understands academic conventions, journal styles, and research terminology.

Unlike general-purpose translation tools (Google Translate, DeepL) or general AI assistants (ChatGPT), Unmute AI is purpose-built for academic paper translation with features like journal style formatting, LaTeX preservation, and IMRAD structure validation.

## Detailed Features

### 1. Real-time Bidirectional Translation
Write in your native language on the left panel, see the translation update in real-time on the right. Edit in either language - changes sync at the sentence level.

### 2. Journal Style Formatting
Choose from 8 academic journal styles. The AI adapts:
- Citation formatting
- Section heading conventions
- Tone and voice (passive vs. active)
- Terminology preferences
- Abbreviation standards

### 3. LaTeX-Aware Translation
Academic papers often use LaTeX. Unmute AI preserves:
- \cite{} and \ref{} commands
- Mathematical equations
- All LaTeX markup and commands
- Table and figure environments

### 4. IMRAD Structure Checking
AI validates your paper structure against the IMRAD standard:
- Introduction
- Methods
- Results
- And Discussion
Identifies missing or weak sections before journal submission.

### 5. Citation Auto-Pilot
Sentence-by-sentence citation suggestion with one-click insertion. Evidence-grounded writing with verified citations (DOI/PMID verified).

### 6. Version Control
Save and restore translation versions. Track revision progress across multiple editing sessions.

### 7. Transparent Cost Tracking
See the cost of each translation in real-time. No surprise bills.

## Technology

- AI Model: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash
- Hosting: Vercel (Tokyo region, hnd1)
- Database: Neon (PostgreSQL)
- Payments: Stripe
- Authentication: Google OAuth

## Supported Languages (17)

| Language | Code | Script Direction |
|----------|------|-----------------|
| Japanese | ja | LTR |
| English | en | LTR |
| Chinese (Simplified) | zh-CN | LTR |
| Chinese (Traditional) | zh-TW | LTR |
| Korean | ko | LTR |
| German | de | LTR |
| French | fr | LTR |
| Spanish | es | LTR |
| Portuguese (Brazilian) | pt-BR | LTR |
| Russian | ru | LTR |
| Italian | it | LTR |
| Hindi | hi | LTR |
| Turkish | tr | LTR |
| Arabic | ar | RTL |
| Indonesian | id | LTR |
| Polish | pl | LTR |
| Persian | fa | RTL |

## Pricing Details

### Free Plan (0 JPY/month)
- 10,000 characters/month translation
- 3 documents maximum
- 5 versions per document
- General Academic style only
- 3 structure checks/month
- Gemini 2.5 Flash

### Pro Plan (980 JPY/month, ~$6.50 USD)
- 100,000 characters/month translation
- 20 documents maximum
- 50 versions per document
- All 8 journal styles
- 30 structure checks/month
- Gemini 2.5 Flash

### Max Plan (2,980 JPY/month, ~$20 USD)
- Unlimited translation
- Unlimited documents
- Unlimited versions
- All 8 journal styles
- Unlimited structure checks
- Gemini 2.5 Flash

## Comparison with Alternatives

### Unmute AI vs. ChatGPT for Paper Writing
- ChatGPT: General-purpose, no journal style awareness, no LaTeX preservation, no structure checking
- Unmute AI: Purpose-built for academic papers, journal-specific formatting, LaTeX-aware, IMRAD validation

### Unmute AI vs. DeepL
- DeepL: General translation, no academic specialization, no document management
- Unmute AI: Academic-specialized, journal style formatting, bidirectional editing, version control

### Unmute AI vs. Grammarly
- Grammarly: English editing/proofreading only, no translation
- Unmute AI: Full translation between 17 languages with academic awareness

## Company

- Product: Unmute AI
- Domain: unmute-ai.com
- Contact: support@unmute-ai.com
- Region: Japan (primary market)
- Jurisdiction: Japanese law, Sendai District Court
